title: PFAV-002 [OL] Panchira of that girl who is popular in the company No.2
overview: If you're too pretty, you won't be able to look at me with lewd eyes, or if you're beautiful, you'll get tired of it after three days. That's why the No. 2 most popular girl in the company is just right for Sukehira. That girl in No. 2 is always erotic because she is always stared at by male employees. It's sexy, moderately loose, and you can see the panties. For Sukehira, No.2 is No.1.
